data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Payment collection (Stripe)', but there is no direct evidence confirming that payment processing through Stripe is implemented or functioning as required. While there are successful booking records, they do not explicitly indicate that the payment was processed via Stripe, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The absence of any evidence related to Stripe payment integration leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that payments are processed through Stripe.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
